concepts.label: Finding
concepts.summary: A detected issue, gap, or nonconformity that needs follow-up and closure.
concepts.why_it_exists: Findings turn an observation into accountable work. They keep issues visible until action is taken and closure is justified.
how_to_use: Create a finding when you identify a real issue, not just a possible risk.
Track remediation status until the issue is closed or formally accepted.

relations.summary: A finding can point to the affected asset.
A finding can describe a control gap or control failure.
A finding can support or refine the risk picture.
